creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
2010/10/9 Rene Ladan <rene@freebsd.org>:
> The port leaves the empty libexec/xfce4 directory behind on deinstall,
> it seems to be erroneously removed from pkg-plist.

Yes it's right, I thought libexec/xfce4 was already cleaned by
xfce4-panel, whereas it isn't present.

All apologies

> See e.g.
> http://freebsd1.asmallorange.com/index.php?action=display_markup_log&build=7.2-i386-rene&id=1291
>
> Rene
>



-- 
olivier
